summary: A clip from a Newsmax segment. It shows a uniformed sheriff interviewed via video link in front of a U.S. flag, with a name caption identifying him as a county sheriff. The segment cuts to security-camera footage of an upscale interior with tables and seating, then to a man in a suit interviewed via video link in front of bookshelves. The lower-third reads DHS DENIES NAQVI'S CLAIMS SHE WAS HELD AT AIRPORT, sourced to a county sheriff's office.

script.scene: A uniformed sheriff is interviewed via video link in front of a U.S. flag; lower-third reads DHS DENIES NAQVI'S CLAIMS SHE WAS HELD AT AIRPORT.
Security-camera footage shows an upscale interior with tables and seating, sourced to a county sheriff's office.
A man in a suit is interviewed via video link in front of bookshelves.

notable_text: NEWSMAX; DHS DENIES NAQVI'S CLAIMS SHE WAS HELD AT AIRPORT
